seoTitle: Lewisville ISD Calendar 2025-2026: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Lewisville ISD 2025-2026 calendar with Aug 12 first day, May 22 last day, holidays, breaks, early release dates, bad weather day, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: Lewisville ISD starts the 2025-2026 school year on August 12, 2025 and lists May 22, 2026 as the end of the fourth nine weeks and student early release day. Thanksgiving Break runs November 24-28, Winter Break runs December 22-January 2, and Spring Break runs March 16-20. The calendar marks April 6, 2026 as a bad weather day.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Lewisville ISD start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: Lewisville ISD starts the 2025-2026 school year on Tuesday, August 12, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Lewisville ISD Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 16 through Friday, March 20, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Lewisville ISD in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last student day is Friday, May 22, 2026, which is also listed as a student early release day.

calendarFaqs.q: What is the Lewisville ISD 2025-2026 bad weather day?
calendarFaqs.a: The official calendar marks Monday, April 6, 2026 as a bad weather day.

yearNumbers.label: Instructional Days
yearNumbers.detail: The calendar lists 85 days in the first semester and 90 days in the second semester.

yearNumbers.label: Student Early Release
yearNumbers.detail: Student early release dates are March 13 and May 22.

yearNumbers.label: Bad Weather Day
yearNumbers.detail: April 6 is marked as the bad weather day on the official academic calendar.
